user.title: Add a gauge station
user.description: Pick a river from the dropdown to browse its stations, or enter a station number directly. Find all rivers at {groups_url}

data_description.group: Choose a river to see its gauge stations in the next step.
data_description.station: If you already know the station number, enter it here and skip the river picker.

select_station.title: Select a station
select_station.description: Choose a gauge station on the {river_name}.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach waterlevel.ie — check your internet connection.
error.invalid_station: Station number must contain digits only.
error.station_not_found: No sensor data found for that station. Verify it exists at waterlevel.ie.
error.select_river_or_station: Select a river or enter a station number.
error.unknown: Unexpected error — check the Home Assistant logs.
